headline: IFF to Optimize Portfolio With Its Food Ingredients Business Sale
summary: International Flavors sells its Food Ingredients unit as part of a portfolio overhaul, aiming to cut debt and focus on higher-growth, innovation-led segments.

raw.headline: IFF to Optimize Portfolio With Its Food Ingredients Business Sale

headline: NEXA Resumes Cajamarquilla Smelter Operations After Fire Incident
summary: Nexa Resources resumes Cajamarquilla smelter operations after a fire, with zinc production lines restarting and lost output expected to be recovered in 2026.

raw.headline: NEXA Resumes Cajamarquilla Smelter Operations After Fire Incident
raw.summary: Nexa Resources resumes Cajamarquilla smelter operations after a fire, with zinc production lines restarting and lost output expected to be recovered in 2026.

headline: BofA Lifts Price Target on Air Products (APD) After Earnings Beat
summary: Air Products and Chemicals, Inc. (NYSE:APD) ranks among the top hydrogen stocks to buy now. On May 1, BofA Securities boosted Air Products and Chemicals, Inc. (NYSE:APD)’s price target to $305 from $303, retaining a Neutral rating on the company’s shares. The company announced second-quarter EPS of $3.20, which exceeded BofA’s expectation of $3.04. The […]

headline: Air Products and Chemicals (APD) Loses 7.5% in 4 Weeks, Here's Why a Trend Reversal May be Around the Corner
summary: The heavy selling pressure might have exhausted for Air Products and Chemicals (APD) as it is technically in oversold territory now. In addition to this technical measure, strong agreement among Wall Street analysts in revising earnings estimates higher indicates that the stock is ripe for a trend reversal.

headline: A Look At Air Products And Chemicals (APD) Valuation After Recent Share Price Volatility
summary: Why Air Products and Chemicals (APD) is on investors’ radar Air Products and Chemicals (APD) has drawn fresh attention after recent share price moves, with the stock down 1.8% over the past day and 7.5% over the past month, while still positive year to date. See our latest analysis for Air Products and Chemicals. Recent trading has been choppy, with the share price down 7.5% over the past month but still showing an 11.2% year to date share price return and a 2.7% total shareholder return over...
